subcodes.first_line: O Lord, make Thou this marriage to become a cause of heavenly blessings and a means of enkindlement with the fire of Thy love
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند اين اقتران را سبب برکت آسمانی کن و اسباب اشتعال بنار محبّتت در ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for married couples, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
full_text_parts: O Lord, make Thou this marriage to become a cause of heavenly blessings and a means of enkindlement with the fire of Thy love in the eternal Kingdom. Vouchsafe Thy grace in order that both may be favoured at Thy Holy Threshold and remain firm in Thy love, may advance spiritually with every passing day, and may become two resplendent signs of faith and certitude amongst the people.
